title: Help me create a new quote for a client in Workroo…

messages.content:
Hello! I'm **MAX**, your Empire AI Assistant.

_Tip: Ctrl+V to paste images · Shift+Enter for newlines_
Help me create a new quote for a client in WorkroomForge.

Beautiful piece! I can see a **classic rolled-arm sofa** upholstered in an elegant **gray and white wide stripe fabric** — very clean, transitional style. Perfect for a high-end residential project.

To build this quote right here, I just need a few details:

---

### 📋 Client Info
1. **Client name?**
2. **Phone & email?**
3. **Address?**

---

### 🛋️ Project Details
4. **Is this quote for reupholstering this sofa specifically?**
5. **Any other items — chairs, ottomans, pillows?**
6. **Has the fabric been selected?** (or are they choosing from your workroom samples?)
7. **Any window treatments to include** in this quote as well?

---

Once you give me those details, I'll open the **QuoteBuilder right here** with everything pre-filled — no need to navigate anywhere else. 🚀
